videos.title: TEAM NJW VLOG - Test race
videos.description:
New vlog is up! Mart Kevin Põlluste took part in a locally organised race by our own ski enthusiasts 😉 
Take a look, how it went down!
videos.transcript:
so
today we are doing a quick test run with
the
local master skiers that have organized
this in
close to thailand the plan was to have a
hard training
but this opportunity presented itself so
we'll see the plan is to do some
sprint in between every 10k
let's see if i can hold it up or not
[Music]
good night
one minute
bye
the thing that killed me is the sprints
in every 10k
tried to push really hard on the change
to the lap
so kind of ran out of energy in the last
two laps
but i think overall it was pretty good i
could all the time push
really hard so i felt happy
but yeah i was alone so
that was a little shame but other than
that i think
i think the race was good

videos.title: 46th Tartu Maraton - trailer
videos.description:
Tartu Maraton is also known as the Estonian Song Festival of Winter because of its grand proportions and international fame. It brings together thousands of skiing enthusiasts every year from all corners of the world.

Lear more here ➡️ http://bit.ly/TM2019_eng

videos.title: Lumestuudio #16 48. Haanja Maraton
videos.description: Lumestuudio 16. osas arutleb Vahur Teppan 48. Haanja Maratoni peakorraldajaga, kuidas maratoni päev osalejale välja näeb ning mida peab silmapidama.
